mapper.select: SELECT n.POST_SN , n.NOTICE_TYPE_CD , b.POST_SJ , b.POST_CN , b.WRTR_USER_ID , b.TOP_FIX_ORD , b.POPUP_EXPS_YN , b.REG_DT , b.MDFCN_DT , c.COM_CD_NM AS NOTICE_TYPE_NM FROM NOTICE n JOIN BOARD b ON b.POST_SN = n.POST_SN LEFT JOIN COM_CD c ON c.CL_CODE = '103' AND c.COM_CD = n.NOTICE_TYPE_CD WHERE n.POST_SN = #{postSn}

SELECT n.POST_SN , n.NOTICE_TYPE_CD , b.POST_SJ , b.POST_CN , b.WRTR_USER_ID , b.TOP_FIX_ORD , b.POPUP_EXPS_YN , b.REG_DT , b.MDFCN_DT , c.COM_CD_NM AS NOTICE_TYPE_NM FROM NOTICE n JOIN BOARD b ON b.POST_SN = n.POST_SN LEFT JOIN COM_CD c ON c.CL_CODE = '103' AND c.COM_CD = n.NOTICE_TYPE_CD WHERE n.POST_SN < #{postSn} ORDER BY n.POST_SN DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT n.POST_SN , n.NOTICE_TYPE_CD , b.POST_SJ , b.POST_CN , b.WRTR_USER_ID , b.TOP_FIX_ORD , b.POPUP_EXPS_YN , b.REG_DT , b.MDFCN_DT , c.COM_CD_NM AS NOTICE_TYPE_NM FROM NOTICE n JOIN BOARD b ON b.POST_SN = n.POST_SN LEFT JOIN COM_CD c ON c.CL_CODE = '103' AND c.COM_CD = n.NOTICE_TYPE_CD WHERE n.POST_SN > #{postSn} ORDER BY n.POST_SN ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
